<claim>Thesis claim for decision 5: the chosen synthesis option is correct.</claim>

<evidence>Supporting reference: see skills/shared/dialectic-protocol.md:83 for parser rules that govern how this decision's resolution will be applied downstream.</evidence>

<strongest_concession>Opposing side has a legitimate point about alternative complexity trade-offs on this specific decision.</strongest_concession>

<counter_to_opposition>That concern is mitigated by co-versioning with the normative rules in the protocol document.</counter_to_opposition>

<risk_if_wrong>Risk: downstream consumers parse a mis-labelled resolution and miscalibrate Step 2b's antithesis engagement.</risk_if_wrong>

RECOMMEND: THESIS
